summary: Iteration 6 - Complete testing of ErrorBoundary, Tutor crash fix, expanded Warrior Practices, Nutritional Architecture recipes, and Training Regimen session architecture. All features verified working. Backend: 24/24 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All pages load without errors, all new content sections render correctly.
passed_tests: Tutor page loads without crashing - ErrorBoundary wraps the entire app
Tutor page defaults to Conversation tab and shows greeting message 'An im-vel...'
Tutor speech API initialization has try-catch safety (lines 106-143 in VelnarTutor.jsx)
Tutor Course tab loads with course levels and lessons
Warrior Practices page loads with all 4 disciplines: Iaido, Kyudo, Systema, Throwing Daggers
Iaido has 5 stages with detailed_instructions containing skills with how_to_do_it steps
Iaido has expanded Training Reference: Body Map, Drill Menu (6 drills), Faults & Corrections (6), Week Progression (6), Self-Audit (5 questions), Self-Teaching Boundaries
Kyudo has expanded: Preparatory Capacities (5), Drill Menu (9 drills), Faults & Corrections (5), Proficiency Standards (4)
Systema has expanded: Core Principles (5), Solo Modules (5), Partner Progression (6 stages), Failure Patterns (5)
Throwing Daggers has 5 stages with detailed step-by-step exercises
Nutritional Architecture page has Recipes tab with 4 recipes
Recipe names: Lemon Salmon, Four-Egg Cognitive Plate, Controlled Recovery Snack, Lean Protein & Vegetables
Each recipe has ingredients array, sourcing text, and step-by-step instructions array
Weekly Prep Protocol displayed in Recipes tab
Progress Markers (4 entries) displayed in Recipes tab
Training Regimen page has Session Architecture with 6 phases
Training Regimen has Proficiency Model with 4 tiers: Novice, Apprentice, Practitioner, Advanced Practitioner
Training Regimen has 12-Month Roadmap with 4 quarters (M1-3, M4-6, M7-9, M10-12)
Training Regimen has Logbook Standard section
All API endpoints return 200 status codes
ErrorBoundary component exists at /app/frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.jsx
ErrorBoundary wraps BrowserRouter in App.js (line 23-45)
VelnarTutor has safe speech API checks with typeof window !== 'undefined' (lines 107-118)
seed_data_creation: None - using existing data from warrior_practices_full.py, training_nutrition.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 6 verified all new features: 1) ErrorBoundary wraps entire app preventing crashes, 2) Tutor page has safe speech API initialization with try-catch and typeof checks, 3) Warrior Practices has expanded reference sections (body_map, drill_menu, faults_and_corrections, week_progression, self_audit for Iaido; preparatory_capacities, proficiency_standards for Kyudo; core_principles_expanded, solo_modules, partner_progression, failure_patterns for Systema), 4) Nutritional Architecture has 4 full recipes with ingredients, sourcing, and step-by-step instructions plus weekly_prep_protocol and progress_markers, 5) Training Regimen has session_architecture (6 phases), proficiency_model (4 tiers), twelve_month_roadmap (4 quarters), and logbook_standard. All pages render without errors.
